import tempfile
import os

def write_report(data: str) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".txt", delete=False)
    tmp.write(data)
    tmp.flush()
    os.fsync(tmp.fileno())
    return tmp.name

def create_workspace() -> str:
    tmp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="workspace_")
    config_path = os.path.join(tmp_dir, "config.json")
    with open(config_path, "w") as f:
        f.write("{}")
    return tmp_dir

def process_upload(file_bytes: bytes) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="wb", suffix=".bin")
    tmp.write(file_bytes)
    return tmp.name

def export_csv(rows: list[dict]) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".csv", delete=False)
    for row in rows:
        tmp.write(",".join(str(v) for v in row.values()) + "\n")
    tmp.close()
    return tmp.name
